evals.prompt: I am writing a radical borylation intro. Find 8-12 papers from 2020 onward about Lewis base boryl radicals, include DOI and abstract when possible, and return import-ready records.
evals.expected_output: OpenAlex-first ranked and deduplicated normalized records with title, authors, journal, year, DOI, abstract, URL, and relevance rationale.

evals.prompt: Search for mechanistic precedents on nickel-catalyzed radical coupling and prioritize high-impact journals. Keep only papers with strong mechanistic discussion.
evals.expected_output: OpenAlex-derived ranked paper list with clear relevance scoring, mechanistic prioritization, and concise search summary.

evals.prompt: I have a messy list of paper titles with duplicates and typos. Please resolve DOIs where possible and output a clean import payload.
evals.expected_output: Cleaned records with duplicate removal, DOI-first deduplication, and uncertainty notes for unresolved OpenAlex matches.

evals.prompt: Find recent mobile-agent systems papers, import the best 5 into Zotero, and make sure full-text retrieval is queued unless a paper is metadata-only.
evals.expected_output: Discovery followed by Zotero import with fetch_full_text enabled by default and a report of which imported items had full-text retrieval queued.

evals.prompt: Find 6 papers on mobile agents, import them, and give me TLDR notes for the most relevant ones.
evals.expected_output: OpenAlex-first discovery, import with post-import full-text retrieval, and explicit handoff to zotero-reading-classifier for TLDR notes.

evals.prompt: I know the paper title approximately, but OpenAlex may miss it. Resolve the DOI if possible, explain any fallback lookup, and still produce a normalized import payload.
evals.expected_output: A normalized import payload with clear fallback handling when OpenAlex is incomplete or misses the known paper.
